- IF [animal has a beak AND/OR prominent neck AND/OR feathers] THEN [2]
- IF [animal has prominent, often bulging eyes AND/OR mottled, rough skin AND/OR a broad, flattened head] THEN [6]
- IF [animal has a mane AND/OR is large and quadrupedal with a distinct head and body shape] THEN [7]
</kb>
<rule_check>
- The rule for class 6 fires because the Query Image shows an animal with prominent, dark, round eyes, mottled and rough brownish-tan skin texture, and a broad, somewhat flattened head shape, which are all consistent with the features observed in the examples for class 6 (frogs/toads).
</rule_check>
<response>6</response>
